ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact or user who created the campaign */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or organization running the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Campaign goal amount */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., failed, successful) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the campaign */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campaign is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the campaign */,
  "launched_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ends */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is spotlighted */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign thumbnail image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign video */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the contact */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the contact */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, creator, backer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory icon image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_categories" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_subcategories" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the backer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign being backed */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward chosen by the backer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer pledged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer's pledge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign offering the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "pledge_required" INTEGER /* Pledge required to receive the reward */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Number of available rewards */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery for the reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faqs" (
  "faq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FAQ */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the FAQ belongs to */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question being asked */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the FAQ was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the FAQ was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faqs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the update belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_picks" (
  "staff_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff pick */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign that is a staff pick */,
  "picked_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was picked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the staff pick was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the staff pick was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_picks_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spotlights" (
  "spotlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spotlight */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign that is spotlighted */,
  "spotlighted_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was spotlighted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the spotlight was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the spotlight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spotlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spotlights_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
